reference: TO PURIFY IT ADD A SMALL QUANTITY OF DILUTE SULPHURIC ACID AND AFTER EVAPORATING TO THREE QUARTERS OF ITS BULK ADD A SATURATED SOLUTION OF CARBONATE OF POTASH OR SODA
text: To purify it, add a small quantity of dilute sulfuric acid, and after evaporating to 3/4 of its bulk, add a saturated solution of carbonate of potash or soda—
